{"id":1427688426,"question_id":26,"lang":"cpp","lang_name":"C++","time":"4 days, 3 hours","timestamp":1729373097,"status":10,"status_display":"Accepted","runtime":"0 ms","url":"/submissions/detail/1427688426/","is_pending":"Not Pending","title":"Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array","memory":"21.2 MB","code":"class Solution {\npublic:\n    int removeDuplicates(vector<int>& nums) {\n        int index = 0;\n        if(nums.empty()) {\n            return 0;\n        }\n        for(int i=0;i<nums.size();i++) {\n            if(nums[index] != nums[i]) {\n                index++;\n                nums[index] = nums[i];\n            }\n        }\n        return index + 1;\n    }\n};","compare_result":"","title_slug":"remove-duplicates-from-sorted-array","has_notes":false,"flag_type":1}
